fieldValues.value: Pulling a specific Field value inline into a Document View is useful, but a syntax such as `{{field:{recordId}/{fieldId}}}` makes a reusable Document View depend on concrete instance IDs. That weakens portability and should wait for an addressing model that can express reusable selection rules rather than binding a definition to one Record.

sourceRefs.note: Imported from scds-rationale.md: "Field transclusion in Document Views"
